summary: Iteration 9 - Cleanup Pass - All 26 backend tests PASSED. Comprehensive testing of deprecated role blocking, branch DELETE authorization + dependency checks, franchises field in dashboards, and RBAC strictness for feedback/audit endpoints completed successfully.
passed_tests: Deprecated Super Admin (superadmin@servall.com) login correctly blocked with deactivation message
GET /api/branches returns branches with 'status' field but NO 'latitude' or 'longitude' fields
POST /api/branches as Manager succeeds (managers can create)
DELETE /api/branches/{id} as CEO works for empty branch
DELETE /api/branches/{id} as Manager returns 403 (only super level can delete)
DELETE /api/branches/{id} returns 400 if branch has active jobs (dependency check)
GET /api/dashboard/stats as CEO returns 'franchises' object with {upcoming, active, total_upcoming, total_active} and per-branch open_jobs+employees
GET /api/feedback/submissions as Executor (Jr HR) returns 403 (RBAC enforced)
GET /api/audit as Manager returns 403 (only super level)
Branch creation silently ignores latitude/longitude fields - they are NOT in response
seed_data_creation: Test branches created with TEST_ prefix pattern for authorization and dependency tests, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cleanup pass completed successfully. (1) Deprecated roles (Super Admin, Franchise Dev Manager, HR Executive) are blocked from login with is_active=false. (2) Branch DELETE endpoint works with proper authorization (super level only) and dependency checks (400 if branch has jobs/employees). (3) lat/long fields are stripped from all branch responses. (4) CEO/HR/Manager dashboards include 'franchises' field with correct structure. (5) Feedback admin endpoints (GET /api/feedback/submissions) restricted to CEO+HR only. (6) Audit logs (GET /api/audit) restricted to super level only. All Phase 1/2 features remain functional.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp 11za: LIVE httpx call - fire-and-forget (logs warnings on failure but does NOT fail the request)
